name: Oven-Barbecued Short Ribs
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup burgundy, claret, or other red dinner wine
recipeInstructions:
1. If desired, replace the wine with beef broth.
2. Trim excess fat from the short ribs and rub a hot skillet with some of the fat.
3. Brown the ribs on all sides in the skillet, then drain off any remaining fat.
4. In a separate bowl, whisk together the tomato sauce, chopped onion, salt, wine vinegar, prepared mustard, and cayenne pepper.
5. Pour the mixture over the ribs, ensuring they are fully coated.
6. Cover the pan tightly with foil or use a baking dish cover.
7. Bake in a slow oven (300 degrees F) for 1 1/2 to 2 hours, or until the meat is tender.
Note: Ensure all ingredients and steps are accurately represented from the original recipe without any alterations or additions.
